languages.original_text: "Eogunn, now that you've seen the real me, I suppose you won't want to have any more of our highbrow chats, will you?"

languages.text: "Эоганн, теперь, когда увидел меня настоящую, поди больше не пожелаешь вести со мной заумные беседы?"
"Eogunn, now that you've seen the real me, I suppose you won't want to have any more of our highbrow chats, will you?"
languages.original_text: "Эоганн, теперь, когда увидел меня настоящую, поди больше не пожелаешь вести со мной заумные беседы?"

traits.locale_text: "Eogunn, now that you've seen the real me, I suppose you won't want to have any more of our highbrow chats, will you?"
"Eogunn, now that you've seen the real me, I suppose you won't want to have any more of our highbrow chats, will you?"
"Eogunn, now that you've seen the real me, I suppose you won't want to have any more of our highbrow chats, will you?"

languages.text: «Eogunn, ahora que ha visto mi verdadero ser, imagino que no querrá seguir conversando conmigo».
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, now that you've seen the real me, I suppose you won't want to have any more of our highbrow chats, will you?"

traits.locale_text: «Eogunn, ahora que ha visto mi verdadero ser, imagino que no querrá seguir conversando conmigo».

languages.text: 「エオガン、本当のアタシを見ちゃった以上、もうアタシとの小難しいおしゃべりなんて、ごめんだって思ってるんでしょう？」
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, now that you've seen the real me, I suppose you won't want to have any more of our highbrow chats, will you?"

traits.locale_text: 「エオガン、本当のアタシを見ちゃった以上、もうアタシとの小難しいおしゃべりなんて、ごめんだって思ってるんでしょう？」

languages.text: “伊奥贡，既然你已经看到了我的真面目，想必你不再想和我谈什么阳春白雪了吧？”
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, now that you've seen the real me, I suppose you won't want to have any more of our highbrow chats, will you?"

traits.locale_text: “伊奥贡，既然你已经看到了我的真面目，想必你不再想和我谈什么阳春白雪了吧？”

languages.text: "Eogunn, nun, da Ihr meine wahre Gestalt kennt, habt Ihr vermutlich kein Interesse mehr an unseren hochgeistigen Gesprächen oder?"
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, now that you've seen the real me, I suppose you won't want to have any more of our highbrow chats, will you?"

traits.locale_text: "Eogunn, nun, da Ihr meine wahre Gestalt kennt, habt Ihr vermutlich kein Interesse mehr an unseren hochgeistigen Gesprächen oder?"

languages.text: « Eogunn, à présent que vous avez vu qui je suis vraiment, je suppose que nos petites joutes intellectuelles ne vous intéressent plus, n'est-ce pas ? »
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, now that you've seen the real me, I suppose you won't want to have any more of our highbrow chats, will you?"

traits.locale_text: « Eogunn, à présent que vous avez vu qui je suis vraiment, je suppose que nos petites joutes intellectuelles ne vous intéressent plus, n'est-ce pas ? »

languages.text: "Eogunn, gerçek beni gördüğüne göre artık o yüksek entelektüel sohbetlerimizi yapmak istemezsin herhâlde..."
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, now that you've seen the real me, I suppose you won't want to have any more of our highbrow chats, will you?"
